name: Anika Rahman
bio: Met in CSE department at BUET. We study together and go for walks around Dhanmondi Lake on weekends.

name: Rafiul Hasan
bio: Grew up together in Sylhet. We play cricket every Eid holiday. Haven't caught up in a while.

name: Sara Malik
bio: Met at a React conference in Toronto in 2023. She is a senior engineer at Shopify and gives great career advice.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: Working together at a Dhaka-based fintech startup. We collaborate daily on backend APIs. Very talented Node.js developer.

name: Nadia Chowdhury
bio: Cousin's close friend from London. Met during their Dhaka visit in 2022. We lost touch after they went back.

name: Imran Hossain
bio: E-commerce client from Chattogram. Currently building his second project with me — a Next.js 14 storefront with Stripe integration.

name: Mehreen Akter
bio: Friends since Notre Dame College days. We share a love for Bengali literature and meet at the Ekushey Book Fair every year.

name: Daniel Osei
bio: Met through a GitHub open source project in 2021. He is a backend developer from Accra, Ghana. We pair-program occasionally.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: UI/UX designer I collaborate with on freelance projects. Based in Bangalore. She designed the dashboard for my last MERN project.

name: Sabbir Mahmud
bio: My roommate from 3rd and 4th year at university. He now runs a small SaaS business in Gulshan. We catch up over biriyani.
